text:
You are working on beads issue kapow-r4q.1: Web shared bootstrap.

## WORKTREE SETUP — RUN FIRST
Before doing anything else, create and enter an isolated worktree:
```bash
REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
BRANCH_NAME="worktree/web-bootstrap"
WORKTREE_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME"

if [ -d "$WORKTREE_DIR" ]; then
  echo "Worktree already exists, reusing"
else
  git worktree add "$WORKTREE_DIR" -b "$BRANCH_NAME"
fi

cd "$WORKTREE_DIR"
```
Verify you are in the right place:
```bash
echo "CWD: $(pwd)"
echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)"
echo "$(pwd)" | grep -q '\.claude/worktrees/' && echo "WORKTREE VERIFIED" || echo "FATAL: NOT in a worktree"
```
If verification fails, STOP.

ALL subsequent commands must run from this worktree directory.

## Issue Details
**kapow-r4q.1: Web shared bootstrap**

Extract the web provider tree and bootstrap logic into a shared production-grade entrypoint so tests and production render through the same composition path.

**Acceptance Criteria**: Web app provider/bootstrap composition lives in a shared module consumed by production and tests. The shared bootstrap includes the theme and other required providers. Divergence between app-shell test setup and production setup is materially reduced.

## Instructions
1. Read web/CLAUDE.md for frontend conventions
2. Read web/src/main.tsx to see the current production bootstrap
3. Read web/src/test/render.tsx to see the test bootstrap (renderWithMantine)
4. Read web/src/theme.ts for the theme config
5. Read web/src/App.tsx for the app structure
6. Identify all providers in production (MantineProvider, Router, urql, Auth, etc.)
7. Create a shared bootstrap module at `web/src/bootstrap.tsx` (or similar) that:
   - Exports a `<AppProviders>` component wrapping all shared providers
   - Is used by `main.tsx` for production
   - Is used by `test/render.tsx` for tests
8. Update `main.tsx` to use the shared bootstrap
9. Update `test/render.tsx` to use the shared bootstrap (tests may need router/urql mocks)
10. Ensure all existing tests still pass

## Quality Gate
Web-only change. Run: `cd web && pnpm build && pnpm lint && pnpm test`

## When Done
Commit and push:
```bash
git add -A
git commit -m "refactor: extract shared web bootstrap for production and test parity

Creates shared AppProviders component used by both production main.tsx
and test render helpers, reducing divergence between test and production
provider composition.

Closes kapow-r4q.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>"
git push -u origin HEAD
```
Report completion with build/test results.
